title: GHB Sports Marking Football Cones Football Training Cones Marker Cones Discs Set with Carry Bag and Cone Holder Space Marking Cones for Kids Football Practice, Sports, Games, Home Fitness
features: Lightweight and hard-wearing: 25 soft flexible cones in 5 different bright colours and supplied on a holder and in a mesh bag. Easily carried and easy to clean. Durable and won't crack or fade, fine workmanship, and can be used repeatedly

Bright and Colorful: The training cones have 5 different colours. Each colour is bright and stands out against grass, or even wooden, or grit pitches. It's easy to find them wherever else the delightful kids have thrown them

Used for Football Practice: The football cones training set can be set up for dribbling, mark goal area, used as the obstacles, boundary line markers, and course markers. They can be stacked together to increase the obstacle height, and also can resist the wind during the outdoors training. Great for getting kids started and developing their football skills in the garden

Used for Games: The marker cones are great for all sorts of games with kids, like using these to make lanes. They also can be used to amuse your fluffy friend by hiding treats underneath and he sniffs them out. Great choice for Christmas, Birthday or Easter gifts for kids

Used for Sports: The sports cones can be used for obstacle courses on bikes and rollerblades training. Great for the kids control their bikes or rollerblades. They can pop back into shape even your kids have crushed them with their bikes
